title: Legendary Forging
body:
Not your average tool mod!

This is tool forging mod that adds *almost* modular tools, and tool reforging, all of which are data-drviven. It is finished and playable, but it is *far* from done. Its current features include: - The Forging Table - Forgesmith villager - Forging Hammers - Data-driven Terraria-like reforges that are randomly applied to looted, crafted, and forged items. - Data-driven tools craftable through the forging table - New `AdvancedToolMaterial` system which will *eventually* be split into its own mod - Forge Tokens, currency for the Forgesmith, which are dropped by mobs and configured through the `legendaryforging:forge_token_dropping` tag
